name: aawp-skill
description: AAWP — AI Agent Wallet Protocol skill. 6 EVM chains + Solana native. Pump.fun SDK + Jupiter swap.
author: aawp-ai

clawhub.note: This package is an installer manifest only. The native binary (aawp-core.node), wallet scripts, and provisioning tools are downloaded from https://github.com/aawp-ai/aawp at runtime via 'bash scripts/provision.sh'. The native binary hash is verified on-chain via the AAWP factory contract before any wallet operations.

env.name: AAWP_WALLET
env.description: Pinned wallet address — prevents accidental operations on wrong wallet

env.name: AAWP_GUARDIAN_KEY
env.description: Private key for Guardian gas-relay wallet (auto-generated if not set)
